message:
fix(db): replace INSERT...RETURNING with last_insert_rowid() + migrate share crate to sqlmodel-sqlite

The core DB query layer (mcp-agent-mail-db/queries.rs) replaces all
INSERT...RETURNING id patterns with INSERT followed by SELECT
last_insert_rowid(). This fixes compatibility with SQLite builds that
don't support RETURNING (pre-3.35) and avoids subtle transaction
isolation issues where RETURNING could return stale values under
WAL-mode concurrent writes. release_reservations() refactored into a
two-step SELECT+UPDATE pattern for the same reason.

Share crate migration:
- mcp-agent-mail-share/Cargo.toml swaps mcp-agent-mail-core and
  mcp-agent-mail-db dependencies for sqlmodel-sqlite = "0.2.0"
- All share submodules (bundle, finalize, scope, scrub, snapshot,
  static_render) updated to accept SqliteConnection instead of the
  crate-specific DbConn wrapper, reducing coupling between the share
  and core crates

Additional improvements across the server and tooling crates:
- cleanup.rs: expanded cleanup logic with better error propagation
- integrity_guard.rs: minor adjustment to guard checks
- server/lib.rs: import path update for new dependency layout
- tui_poller.rs: polling interval adjustment
- storage/lib.rs: storage backend import update
- search-core/two_tier.rs: two-tier search scoring refinements
- tools/reservations.rs: reservation handling updates

Workspace Cargo.toml adds sqlmodel-sqlite = "0.2.0" to workspace deps.
Cargo.lock updated with new dependency graph.
Beads issue tracking updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
